data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Multi-language support' as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of multi-language support features. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement, as the step explicitly requires validation through API reads and persisted state checks, which were not conducted.
gaps: No evidence of multi-language support functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify multi-language support.
